apiKey.decryptFailed: API key could not be decrypted
apiKey.decryptFailedDetail: The saved API key could not be decrypted (e.g. after browser change or deleted data). Please re-enter your API key.
apiKey.invalidKey: Invalid API key. Please enter a valid key.
apiKey.noInternet: No internet connection. Please check your connection.
apiKey.rateLimited: Rate limit reached. Please wait and try again. (API key is valid)
collab.p2pDescription: Share the Room ID with your co-authors. Everyone in the same room sees changes live — without a server.
collab.passwordHint: All participants must enter the same password to join the room.
collab.technicalDescription: Collaboration uses Yjs + WebRTC for P2P synchronization. Data is transferred directly between browsers — no server stores your content.
collab.title: Collaboration
collab.securityWarningDetail: Le connessioni usano un server di inoltro pubblico per impostazione predefinita. Il contenuto della stanza è crittografato P2P, ma i metadati di connessione (ID stanza) passano attraverso il relay. Per progetti sensibili, considera l'auto-hosting.
common.dictation.title: Dettatura
consistencyChecker.description: Check your characters for inconsistencies with the established lore, other characters, and your manuscript.
consistencyChecker.noResults: No results yet. Select a character and run a check.
consistencyChecker.storyBible.empty: Turn on “Story Bible advanced” under Settings → AI → Feature flags, then edit the manuscript to extract codex graph data.
consistencyChecker.storyBible.title: Story Bible (Codex)
consistencyChecker.title: Consistency Checker
critic.description: Get professional feedback on your writing and detect plot holes in your story.
critic.textPlaceholder: Paste your text here for analysis...
critic.title: AI Critic & Plot Analysis
empty.manuscript.description: Add your first section to start writing in the manuscript editor.
empty.manuscript.title: No chapters yet
error.apiErrorDescription: The AI failed to generate a response. Please check your connection and API key, then try again. If the problem persists, the service may be temporarily unavailable.
error.boundary.description: An unexpected error occurred. You can try resetting the view or reloading the page.
error.boundary.title: Something went wrong.
error.db.invalidState: Internal database error. Please reload the page.
error.db.quotaExceeded: Browser storage is full. Please delete old projects or snapshots.
error.db.unknown: Unknown error while accessing the database.
error.mic.denied: Microphone access denied. Please grant permission in your browser settings.
error.mic.noDevice: No microphone found. Please connect a microphone.
error.mic.noSpeech: No speech detected. Please try again.
error.mic.unsupported: Language not supported by the browser.
error.ollama.unreachableHint: Ollama not reachable ({{url}}). Make sure Ollama is running: ollama serve
palette.labs.crossProjectToastBody: Project picker search is coming soon—stay on the dashboard for now.
palette.labs.healthScoreToastBody: Turn on the dashboard card in Settings → AI → Labs-style flags, then refine goals and cast lists.
palette.shortcut.newSectionToast: New section added to your manuscript.
palette.shortcut.searchHintBody: Use the command palette to jump anywhere—including Search-like navigation.
palette.suggestion.fromDashboard: Jump into writing from your dashboard
palette.suggestion.longDraft: Run a consistency pass on your draft
palette.suggestion.lowWordCount: Warm up the AI writing studio
pwa.shareReceivedHint: Salvato per questa sessione — puoi incollarlo nello Studio di scrittura quando vuoi.
pwa.installDescription: Disponibile offline · Accesso diretto dalla schermata home
pwa.installHint: Available offline · Direct access from homescreen
pwa.offlineNote: Writing, Saving & Snapshots continue to work.
pwa.offlineWorksContinue: Scrittura, salvataggio e snapshot continuano a funzionare.
pwa.updateDescription: A new version of StoryCraft Studio is ready.

sceneboard.act2.label: Act 2 – Conflict
sceneboard.act3.label: Act 3 – Resolution
sceneboard.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this scene?
sceneboard.dragAriaLabel: Sort scenes – Drag & Drop or press Enter to select, arrow keys to move
sceneboard.noScenes: No scenes yet. Add one to get started.
sceneboard.timeline.hint: Imposta inizio ISO e durata ISO 8601 (es. PT2H o 3 giorni) nell’editor scena.
sceneboard.timeline.rulesTruncated: Solo i primi suggerimenti — elenco leggero.
sceneboard.timeline.unparsedFields: {{title}}: campi temporali non interpretabili — verifica ISO.
sceneboard.title: Scene Board
templates.offlineFallback: You are offline — showing embedded example templates. For the complete community offering, connect to the internet.
templates.offlineNotice: You are offline — showing embedded example templates. For the complete community offering, connect to the internet.
vc.compareHint: Testo affiancato; evidenziazione a livello di riga.
vc.compareTruncated: Prime {{shown}} di {{total}} righe (meno carico su hardware modesto).
vc.compareWordHint: Le righe modificate evidenziano anche le parole cambiate.
vc.createSnapshotDescription: Saves the current state of the manuscript as a restorable snapshot.
vc.noSnapshotsHint: Create a snapshot to save the current state.
vc.restoreDescription: The manuscript will be reset to the snapshot
vc.restoreWarning: The current state will be lost unless a snapshot exists. Create one beforehand!
vc.title: Version History
crossSearch.title: Ricerca nel progetto
crossSearch.matchType.title: Titolo
crossSearch.hint: Digita per cercare titolo, logline, sezioni del manoscritto e personaggi.
crossSearch.scopeNote: Ricerca nel progetto corrente — ricerca multi-progetto in v2.
crossSearch.indexEmpty: Nessun progetto indicizzato ancora. Apri altri progetti per aggiungerli.
